chapter_title: Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
text: A permit issued under this subchapter is effective for a 10-day period and valid only for a single continuous movement.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 623. Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 623.127 — Duration of Permit

A permit issued under this subchapter is effective for a 10-day period and valid only for a single continuous movement.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: A permit issued under this subchapter is effective for a 10-day period and valid only for a single continuous movement.

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
